description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux Special Builds on PRs that runs on every pull request. Use three ubuntu-latest jobs with different configurations: one for Debug with coverage, one for Release with Valgrind, and one for Release with Sanitizers. In each job, check out the repository, install Conan and dependencies, configure Conan, install and build the project with specific CMake flags, and run unit tests with optional coverage or Valgrind.
